textByHash.27b7df12d72f66307a6360428a92469ba1774557: Silver! Silver! Best prices for buying and selling in all Kandarin!
textByHash.ac0a9e13b930a7c179279494bff06c86890bda6b: That I am. What do you want? You realise I'm working here.
textByHash.8113a925bdfa34f8a13ca4745af03b44b4223569: That can only cause chaos! Well, my great Grandfather lived and died there according to my mother, but even she knows very little about him.
textByHash.3943c621d984d4e843146d57d14b0c7dc77fc3cb: The only thing I have of his is a key. It's a strange key, it changes temperature by itself as you walk around. I'm afraid I don't know what it's for though.
textByHash.fdcfafce69a99aead663fe39c9f88662c446e5c8: Well, I imagine it's to some sort of chest of his belongings as it's too small for a door. Perhaps if you find some of his belongings you will discover some clues amongst them.
textByHash.bd374b39a468933cf5413b5cf28178cfaeb130e3: Why not. I can't use it anyway. Try feeling its change in temperature as you walk around.
textByHash.fc710a98e39abf2dae727d9da59c035f046130fe: Keep trying. Have you noticed that the key changes temperature as you walk around?
textByHash.6d69db3e35c152055b5b3883296bb314ec4b96e4: Very interesting. Best you show it to Jorral at the outpost.
textByHash.8024b4a3a098dbcbad733fbda998c497395d0471: Keep it, it may come in handy.
textByHash.b828e9888838383acce25bd4ffd2b5dcad6d95e3: New taxes? What are you on about?
textByHash.410d71246b10b11ce29285297939644199ecec36: Well that is unacceptable! I will have to increase my prices. I've produced silver for the king himself before but don't expect me to do that again!
textByHash.c60f90be497d10a93d8fd1665bd2729ee75ade3c: The king wouldn't send a mourner to tell me this. Clear off!
textByHash.e1d1f8152d76eddb1381a6175763dcbf86b23fed: The king wouldn't send a citizen to tell me this. Clear off!
textByHash.7580ae9cd9fb139bc0c97aa2f023c45929fdb953: Hello, I hope Jorral was pleased with that Journal.
textByHash.171c16b1de9ad380e7163a0756d29fb01cfba71b: Oh dear, luckily I found it, but it'll cost you 500gp as I know it's valuable.
textByHash.daf4a79e209ffda4b89e5a1a462994314eb28118: You don't have enough money, sorry.
textByHash.446370b9a620da9a1222c55e87deebbf1bde71ae: You don't have the space to carry it! Empty some space in your inventory.
textByHash.68a84bc22f747663a7a15bb456abb1486fe5afd9: You know you can use that enchanted key you have on your keyring all over Gielinor. Who knows what you might find?
textByHash.e138044d3a90575fc3509de6739d27d023603b1d: You know you can use that enchanted key you've got stored? You can use it all over Gielinor. Who knows what you might find?
textByHash.f90a2bf5e6b79240f183b95ebdf7004700415923: You know you can use that enchanted key you have all over Gielinor. Who knows what you might find?
textByHash.f9a1d07ad7ee9899a6b8e0e83c8a37223ea4aba0: Really? I suppose it served its purpose.
